programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Whirl
programme.desc: A cartoon series about the loveable, enthusiastic kids of First Second Church. In each episode, the kids tackle a different theme that is central to Christian values. Everything from generosity and forgiveness to doubt.

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in 3 minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome. It's the Blello Show! Let's go!

programme.title: Arise Kids TV
programme.sub-title: Turn it Up 4 - Praise is the key to breakthrough
programme.desc: This week Magz & Shaz hear about some epic deals, we give our memory verse another go, 'The Silly Socks' drop in, Justis brings the word and so much more!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner, his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom and kindness somehow seem to save the day.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, who share the vision of expressing their faith.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Mike dishes out the deets on Chicago's most famous deep dish and keeps the ribs coming at a speakeasy-turned-BBQ joint.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Five Times More Favour And Provision
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Connection is a living, breathing entity, and is the cornerstone of a healthy relationship. Hear first hand how a break down in a marriage can occur and the steps that can be taken to reach reconciliation.

programme.title: The Last Bridesmaid
programme.desc: Becca is always a bridesmaid, but at her cousin's wedding she bonds with Kyle, the videographer covering every stage of the planning. Perhaps she won't be the last woman standing for long.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Give Me an Answer
programme.desc: Exploring answers to life's most difficult questions and recorded on college campus across the United States, Cliffe Knechtle engages with students and professors, to give answers to questions about Christianity.

programme.title: Autumn Stables
programme.desc: Recently widowed Autumn determined to start fresh, decides to sell her horse ranch to a seemingly trustworthy buyer, Jake.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.desc: The famous Warrior-King, Charles the Great, better known as Charlemagne. Throughout the European dark ages he conquered and built the largest Empire in Europe after fall of the Western-Roman Empire.

programme.title: Welcome to Hope
programme.desc: John and Abe's relationship reaches a tipping point, so John starts looking for a new job and a place to live.

programme.title: Smoketown
programme.desc: In the wake of a mysterious and shocking murder, three unique people - an Assistant Chief of Police, a reporter, and a teenage girl - are empowered to fight for the city's poorest neighbourhood.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Join pastor Dr David Jeremiah as he challenges viewers to take hold of the truths of God's Word for themselves and to apply it to the daily circumstances in their own life, by presenting God's truth in clear and practical applications.

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.sub-title: Realms Atmospheres, and Our Divine Authority
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: The Perfect Bride: Wedding Bells
programme.desc: Fitness instructor, Molly, and wedding photographer, Nick are about to get married, but life's complexities and wedding planning threaten to postpone their happily ever after.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Accepting Jesus requires faith, and to be born again.A John 3 (Boise 1982).

programme.title: Destined to Ride
programme.desc: A young girl and her friend team up against two local boys on an epic horseback riding adventure in the country.

programme.title: Hachi: A Dog's Tale
programme.desc: Professor Wilson discovers a lost Akita puppy on his way home. Despite objections from his wife, Hachi endears himself to the family and grows to be Parker's loyal companion.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, relatable, life-changing and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles for living, hear life stories from everyday New Zealanders and equip people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young boy who, in writing his yearly note to Santa, mixes up the letters and sends it to Satan instead.

programme.title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
programme.desc: Godzilla and the almighty Kong face a colossal threat hidden deep within the planet, challenging their very existence and the survival of the human race.

programme.title: Saturday Night
programme.desc: Tensions run high as producer Lorne Michaels and a ferocious troupe of young comedians and writers prepare for the first broadcast of "Saturday Night Live" on Oct. 11, 1975.

programme.title: Rewriting Trump
programme.desc: Filmed over a year, exploring the story of Trump's return to power through the lens of biographer and New York Times best-selling author, Michael Wolff.

programme.title: Spit
programme.desc: An ex-con returns to Australia after 20 years, gets detained, faces old enemies, makes new friends, and teaches his version of mateship while staying one step ahead.

programme.title: Freelance
programme.desc: An ex-special forces operative takes on a security gig for a journalist as she interviews a dictator. When a military coup breaks out, they must survive the jungle and assassins.

programme.title: A Quiet Place: Day One
programme.desc: A young woman named Sam finds herself trapped in New York City during the early stages of an invasion by alien creatures with ultra-sensitive hearing.

programme.title: The Watchers
programme.desc: A 28-year-old artist gets stranded in an expansive, untouched forest in western Ireland. Finding shelter, she meets three strangers who are stalked by mysterious creatures every night.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: As global pop star Skye Riley preps for a world tour, she faces terrifying events and the pressures of fame, pushing her to confront her haunting past.

programme.title: I Saw the TV Glow
programme.desc: A classmate introduces teenage Owen to a mysterious late-night TV show - a vision of a supernatural world beneath their own. Owen's view of reality begins to crack.

programme.title: There's Something in the Barn
programme.desc: Bill moves his family to Norway after inheriting a remote estate. However, the family disturbs an unexpected resident: a barn elf who will go to lengths to drive the family away.

programme.title: Saw X
programme.desc: John Kramer travels to Mexico to cure his cancer, only to discover that it is a scam. He returns to his work with a new purpose, turning the tables on the con artists through traps.

programme.title: Something In The Water
programme.desc: A dream wedding turns into a nightmare when five girlfriends fight for their lives in open water.

programme.title: The Heist Before Christmas
programme.desc: A Christmas-hating boy meets two Santas in the woods, one of whom claims to have fallen from his sleigh, but he is more interested in the other man when he learns he is on the run for robbing a bank.

programme.title: If
programme.desc: After discovering she can see everyone's imaginary friends, a girl embarks on a magical adventure to reconnect forgotten IFs with their kids.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: The Bad Boys are back, but this time with a twist: Miami's finest are now on the run.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: Based on the hit '90s animation, the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles are back and have teamed up with news reporter April O'Neill to save New York City from the evil Shredder.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: Pulled from the sea, Jason Bourne discovers he has the skills of a very dangerous man and no memory of his past.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with Marie. His plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Jason Bourne is racing to solve the mystery of his past while being hunted by the very organisation that hired him.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: When a devious mastermind embroils them in a plot to destroy individual privacy, the Angels set out to bring down the bad guys. But a revelation makes the Angels targets for assassination.

programme.title: RocknRolla
programme.desc: A story of sex, thugs and rock 'n' roll. London is ground zero for the changing times with mobsters from the East and criminals from the streets all vying to change the rules.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: After failing to fight for his family during a robbery, an unassuming father calls on skills from his hidden past to become a lethal vigilante blazing a wild ride to revenge.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: A security expert must infiltrate a burning skyscraper, 225 storeys above ground, when his family are trapped inside by criminals.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Miami cops, Marcus Burnett and Mike Lowrey, have 72 hours to find $100 million worth of heroin that was stolen from the basement of police headquarters.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: As war rages in Europe, a Nazi-scalping squad of American soldiers, known to their enemy as The Basterds, is on a daring mission to take down the leaders of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: The original Bad Boys are back! After a string of assassinations and an attempt on Mike's life, he convinces a hesitant Marcus to hold off retirement and partner one last time.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: A lawyer who has lost any memory that he was once the legendary Peter Pan must travel to Neverland, aided by Tinker Bell, to rescue his children from his nemesis, Captain Hook.

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: A seven-year-old's life is changed forever with the arrival of a suit-wearing, briefcase-carrying baby: his new baby brother.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: A local scientist is often regarded as a failure until he invents a machine that can make food fall from the sky. But little does he know, things are about to take a turn for the worse.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail that has forever dreamed of the ability to move fast is granted his wish after a freak accident. Now he's out to win the Indy 500.

programme.title: Migration
programme.desc: The Mallard family embark on a journey south for the winter to Jamaica via New York City, only for their well-laid plans to go awry, leading to new friends and unknown horizons.

programme.title: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: The woodland friends awaken from their long winter's nap to discover that a large, green hedge has cropped up right through the middle of their once-natural habitat.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: When Troll Village is invaded by the Bergens, two mismatched trolls must try and tolerate each other as they set out on a journey to rescue their friends.

programme.title: Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: Ace detective Harry Goodman goes missing, prompting his son Tim to find out what happened. Aiding the investigation is Harry's former Pokemon partner, Detective Pikachu.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Street-smart Nathan Drake is recruited by seasoned treasure hunter Victor 'Sully' Sullivan to recover a fortune amassed by Ferdinand Magellan, and lost 500 years ago.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: A worker ant changes roles with a soldier ant to woo a forbidden princess.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A bee is abuzz over a scandal: people are stealing honey to eat. With the help of a florist, he sues the human race for 'honey laundering'.

programme.title: Top Cat Begins
programme.desc: Poor, lonely and living on the streets, Top Cat meets Benny, a naive and good-hearted cat looking for adventure.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, the Kranks decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations and to spend the dollars saved on a Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: An American Tail: Fievel Goes West
programme.desc: Lured out west by the crafty Cat R. Waul, Fievel joins forces with famed lawdog Wylie Blurp to thwart a sinister plot to transform unsuspecting settlers into ... mouse burgers!

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: A quick-witted terrier finds his position in the household threatened when his master brings home a stray mongrel with no polish.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: When genetically modified dinosaurs run amok at a new themed resort, a former military man and animal expert must use his special skills to halt an all-out prehistoric slaughter.

programme.title: Dragonheart: Vengeance
programme.desc: After his family is killed, Lukas sets out on an epic quest for revenge, forming an unlikely trio with an ice breathing dragon and a swashbuckling mercenary.

programme.title: Death Race
programme.desc: In a future where extreme sports have grown into TV reality bloodlust, a speedway champion is ordered by a ruthless warden to suit up and drive - or never see his little girl again.

programme.title: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Get ready to rumble in the jungle when a tough bounty hunter is sent deep into the Amazon to bring back his boss' son - a job that's not gonna be as easy!
This film is a ferocious retelling of the ancient Battle of Thermopylae, depicting the titanic clash in which King Leonidas and 300 Spartans fought Xerxes and his massive Persian army to the death.

programme.title: Passengers
programme.desc: A spacecraft transporting thousands of people to a distant planet has a malfunction in its sleep chambers, and as a result two passengers are awakened 90 years too early.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: A security repairman stationed on a desolate future Earth rescues a beautiful stranger from a downed spacecraft. Her arrival will trigger a chain of events that will leave man's fate in his hands.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: When a woman seduces Dom into the world of crime, the crew face trials that will test them like never before.

programme.title: Repo Men
programme.desc: Set in the near future when artificial organs can be bought on credit, it revolves around a man who struggles to make the payments on a heart he has purchased.

programme.title: Scream 2
programme.desc: Two years after the tragic events that plagued Sidney she's moved to college putting the shocking killings behind her. That is until a copycat killer begins acting out a real-life sequel.

programme.title: Suicide Squad
programme.desc: A secret government agency recruits some of the most dangerous, imprisoned, supervillains to execute high-risk, black-ops missions in exchange for clemency.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
programme.desc: Fearsome monsters Godzilla and King Kong square off in an epic battle for the ages, while humanity looks to wipe out both of the creatures and take back the planet once and for all.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Bloodshot, an ex-killer for the mob, is kidnapped and injected with microscopic computers, turning him into a superhuman. Escaping his makers, he seeks revenge.

programme.title: Horrible Bosses 2
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite working stiffs get back to business and wreak havoc in the workplace.

programme.title: Identity Thief
programme.desc: Unlimited funds have allowed Diana to live it up, but there's a glitch: she's financing her shopping with an ID stolen from Sandy Patterson, an accounts rep who lives halfway across the US.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When devoted lifeguard Mitch Buchannon butts heads with a new recruit, they must learn to put their differences aside after uncovering a criminal plot that threatens the future of the bay.

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: A mild-mannered clerk becomes a manic superhero when he stumbles upon a mysterious ancient mask.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2
programme.desc: Beca, Fat Amy and the Barden Bellas are back to pitch slap the world. After a scandal threatens to derail their last year at Barden, they worry that they've lost their harmony for good.

programme.title: Drillbit Taylor
programme.desc: From the hilarious team that bring you Superbad, three students who are bullied by a guy channelling Hannibal Lecter, hire the cheapest mercenary they can find to fight the forces of evil.

programme.title: The 40 Year Old Virgin
programme.desc: Andy Stitzer has gone 40 years without a woman and his pals are out to break his luck. Can he survive their hilariously bad advice? Will he find love and get laid?

programme.title: Bad Neighbours
programme.desc: A rivalry between members of a fraternity house and their quiet neighbours escalates into all-out war.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Stumbling onto what could be one of the biggest crimes in years, can misfit NYPD detectives step up their game to solve the case without killing each other and destroying NYC in the process?

programme.title: Semi-Pro

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A hopelessly single TV producer is in for a rude awakening when a chauvinistic shock jock takes over as host of her poorly rating show.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
programme.desc: Jules realises she's in love with her best friend, who's about to marry someone else. She'll do anything to steal him away, except tell him the truth.

programme.title: Something to Talk About
programme.desc: A contemporary Southern wife and mother has the 'perfect life'. But when she learns that her husband has been unfaithful, she steps back and examines her life from a new perspective.

programme.title: Happiest Season
programme.desc: A holiday romantic comedy that captures the range of emotions tied to wanting your family's acceptance, being true to yourself, and trying not to ruin Christmas.

programme.title: She's Having a Baby
programme.desc: A couple face the terrors of adulthood, from interfering in-laws and career crises to overextended credit and maintaining a house, but are they up to the perils of impending parenthood?

programme.title: Honey: Rise Up And Dance
programme.desc: An aspiring and determined street dancer comes out of the shadow of her trained dancer sister, and joins a dance competition to win the prize of a college scholarship.

programme.title: For Love Of The Game
programme.desc: When a legendary pitcher strikes out with his girlfriend, he has to play the game of his life. The suspense lasts until the last ball is thrown in this heartwarming drama.

programme.title: The Break-Up
programme.desc: After two years together, Gary and Brooke's relationship seems to have taken a comical wrong turn on the way to happily ever after.

programme.title: Ghost
programme.desc: A murdered man returns to save the woman he loves from a similar fate.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A bodyguard is sent to protect a pop-music diva from a homicidal fan. At first repelled by each other, passion ignites as danger explodes around them.

programme.desc: Warren Schmidt, an embittered man who has just retired after 32 years as an insurance company actuary, is about to taste a not-so-sweet slice of life.

programme.title: Being John Malkovich
programme.desc: A depressed Craig Schwartz sells tickets to people so they can enter a portal into actor John Malkovich's mind.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: Coerced into working for a crime boss, a young getaway driver who relies on the beat of his personal soundtrack must face the music when a doomed heist threatens his life.

programme.title: Hail, Caesar!
programme.desc: A fixer for Capitol Pictures in Hollywood deals with a pregnant starlet, gossip columnists, and a kidnapped movie star, even as he considers an attractive job offer, all in a single day.

programme.title: The Passenger
programme.desc: Randy is happy fading into the background. But when his co-worker Benson goes on a sudden violent rampage, Randy is forced to face his fears and confront his troubled past in order to survive.

programme.title: Uproar
programme.desc: A 17-year-old student is forced to get off the fence he has actively sat on all his life to stand up for himself, his whanau (family) and his future in this story of identity.

programme.title: Children of Men
programme.desc: It's 2027. There have been no births for 18 years. Humanity is doomed. Then Clive Owen discovers the key to survival, but can he protect his precious cargo?

programme.title: I.S.S.
programme.desc: Tensions flare in the near-future aboard the International Space Station as a conflict breaks out on Earth.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Sudden death takes on a whole new meaning in this suspenseful action tale where a retired fire-fighter's daughter gets caught up in a terrorist's plan to blow up 17,000 hockey fans.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: An ultra-cool, fresh out of Detroit, foul-mouthed detective is treading on toes in Beverly Hills as he zeroes in on the scum who killed his friend.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop returns to Los Angeles to solve another case. This time, he must direct his efforts towards unravelling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by punks.

programme.title: Up In Smoke
programme.desc: In this hilarious comedy, two free-spirited pot-heads decide to join forces in their endles search for substances to snort, smoke, or drop. This is the first film in the Cheech and Chong series.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part II
programme.desc: Daniel, now a karate champ, goes to Okinawa with Mr Miyagi, his mentor. Miyagi rekindles an old flame while Daniel finds love, and enemies, of his own.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: Following the Normandy landings, a group of US soldiers go behind enemy lines to retrieve a paratrooper whose brothers have been killed in action.

programme.title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior
programme.desc: Max drives the roads of outback Australia in an unending search for gasoline. Arrayed against him and the other defenders of a fuel depot are the bizarre warriors commanded by the Humungus.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A veteran cop gets a suicidal partner. They have one thing in common: they hate working in pairs. But if these two can stand each other, the bad guys don't stand a chance.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Mismatched detective duo Riggs and Murtaugh are onto a gang using diplomatic immunity to traffic in cocaine.

programme.title: Innerspace
programme.desc: A test pilot is miniaturised in a secret experiment, and accidentally injected into a hapless store clerk.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part II
programme.desc: Daniel, now a karate champ, goes to Okinawa with Mr Miyagi, his mentor. Miyagi rekindles an old flame while Daniel finds love, and enemies, of his own.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: Following the Normandy landings, a group of US soldiers go behind enemy lines to retrieve a paratrooper whose brothers have been killed in action.

programme.title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior
programme.desc: Max drives the roads of outback Australia in an unending search for gasoline. Arrayed against him and the other defenders of a fuel depot are the bizarre warriors commanded by the Humungus.

programme.title: Nightmare in the Desert
programme.desc: After returning to her childhood home, someone secretly tracks an outdoor enthusiast and her urbanite boyfriend through the desert.

programme.title: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: An attorney who lived in LA during the Night Stalker's murder spree attempts to clear the name of an inmate who she believes was wrongly accused of the crimes.

programme.title: Cyberstalker
programme.desc: An online stalker torments a young woman.

programme.title: Love Triangle Nightmare
programme.desc: Brittany meets a stranger who has everything she wants in a partner and despite being an unknown man as warned by others, she falls in love with him which leads to something tragic.

programme.title: My Sister's Serial Killer Boyfriend
programme.desc: Maddie, a local reporter investigating a series of killings targeting similar looking women, is caught off guard when her younger sister Olivia is attacked in her own home.

programme.title: Menendez: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: Erik and Lyle Menendez were educated, nice boys from sunny Beverly Hills, California. So when their parents were found shot dead in their home, no one could figure out why they did it.

programme.title: The Perfect Boyfriend
programme.desc: After struggling through a painful divorce, April decides to get back into the dating game and is swept off her feet by the handsome Jacob, who is hiding a dark side and a wife.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Sparks fly when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange as his fascination with her turns into obsession.

programme.title: I Will Survive: The Gloria Gaynor Story
programme.desc: Rising from humble beginnings and overcoming personal challenges, singer Gloria Gaynor soars to the top of the music charts with her legendary hit, I Will Survive.

programme.title: Am I A Serial Killer?
programme.desc: A teenage girl visits her mum on death row and gets lured into a dangerous trap to take the fall for her mother's crimes.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: A reporter who witnesses a brutal murder becomes entangled in a mystery involving conjoined twins who were separated at birth.

programme.title: Framed by My Husband
programme.desc: When June's wealthy husband Rick becomes the target of an extortionist who claims he sexually assaulted her, Rick convinces his wife it's an act of revenge.

programme.title: The Killing Game
programme.desc: Ten years after her daughter's murder, Eve is contacted by a man claiming to be the child's killer, who taunts her with mysterious clues and threats to kill again.

programme.title: A Daughter's Nightmare
programme.desc: Soon after her father's death, college freshman Ariel learns her mother, Dana, has met Adam, a seemingly well-meaning and charming man at a grief support group.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenant
programme.desc: A single mum takes her daughter's advice and lets out her spare room to a student in need. But the consequences are deadly.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Ruby
programme.desc: In the heart of the bayou, Ruby Landry lives a simple, happy life. The only family Ruby has ever known are her loving guardian, Grandmere Catherine, and her drunken Grandpere Jack.

programme.title: Flowers in the Attic
programme.desc: After the death of their father, the four Dollanganger children are convinced by their mother to stay hidden in the attic of their grandparents' mansion so she can reclaim the family fortune.

programme.title: Attack the Block
programme.desc: From the producers of Shaun of the Dead and Hot Fuzz, Attack the Block follows a gang of tough inner-city kids who try to defend their turf against an invasion of savage alien creatures.

programme.title: The Seagull
programme.desc: A fading actress, a fresh-faced ingenue, a famous writer and a failing playwright all come up against one another while visiting a country estate.

programme.title: 6 Days
programme.desc: The incredible true story of six days of terror, after six heavily-armed gunmen invade the Iranian Embassy in London in 1980 and take 26 people hostage.

programme.title: Sea Fever
programme.desc: The crew of a West of Ireland trawler, marooned at sea, struggle for their lives against a growing parasite in their water supply.

programme.title: McClaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: High-Rise
programme.desc: A doctor moves into a London skyscraper where rising tensions and class warfare lead to anarchy.

programme.title: Le Week-End
programme.desc: A long-married couple revisit Paris for a long weekend for the first time since their honeymoon, in hopes of rekindling their relationship - or, perhaps, to bring it to an end.

programme.title: What We Did on Our Holiday
programme.desc: Doug and Abi take their three children on a trip to Scotland for a big family gathering. They are in the midst of a difficult divorce, and have asked the kids to keep it a secret from their family.

programme.title: 44 Inch Chest
programme.desc: A man is shattered by his wife's infidelity. When his friends urge him to exact retribution, he wrestles with remorse, grief and self pity.

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang in the UK traffic eastern European people and then enslave them, the women to sex, the men to illegal fights. They cross a local businessman, and a war escalates.

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: An undocumented Filipino immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home, securing a better future for her family, but a dark discovery threatens to destroy everything.

programme.title: Mothering Sunday
programme.desc: In 1924, housemaid and foundling Jane Fairchild has the rare chance to spend quality time with her secret lover, but unforeseen events will change the course of Jane's life forever.

programme.title: Mary Shelley
programme.desc: The love affair between poet Percy Shelley and 18-year-old Mary Wollstonecraft Godwin, which resulted in Mary Shelley writing Frankenstein.

programme.title: Beast
programme.desc: Moll is stifled by her surroundings, but too beholden to her family to break away. When she meets Pascal, a free-spirited stranger, a whole new world opens up to her.

programme.title: Elstree 1976
programme.desc: Actors and extras reminisce about their time on the set of Star Wars (1977) and how making the film affected their lives.

programme.title: The Lighthorsemen
programme.desc: Four gallant men of the Australian Light Horse Regiment are thrust into the last great cavalry charge when the British campaign in Palestine becomes stalemated in 1917.

programme.title: Wake in Fright
programme.desc: A teacher spirals into degradation when he is stranded in a menacing Outback town. This 1971 classic with Gary Bond and Chips Rafferty has been restored in its original uncompromising form.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: Sonny and his kangaroo Skippy live in Waratah National Park in New South Wales. Matt Hammond, Sonny's father is the park ranger. Skippy saves the day in many adventures.

programme.title: Sweat
programme.desc: Tom and Tats face relationship struggles as Tom's nerves start to affect his performance. Danny and Stewie's new girlfriends turn out to be completely different than expected.

programme.title: Snowy
programme.desc: Stuart's trial concludes; Michael organises opposition.

programme.title: 13th Floor
programme.desc: An electrocuted boy's ghost sides with two young women against hit men in an office building.

programme.title: Celia
programme.desc: Celia an independent and imaginative 9-year old living uncomfortably with her buttoned-down family. When her world falls apart, her life veers between fantasy and reality, violence and tragedy.

programme.title: Body Melt
programme.desc: A mad scientist's vitamin pill causes horrific side effects in its suburbanite consumers.

programme.desc: A little girl tries to stop her mother from fooling around with a man in a car.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Join pastor Dr David Jeremiah as he challenges viewers to take hold of the truths of God's Word for themselves and to apply it to the daily circumstances in their own life, by presenting God's truth in clear and practical applications.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: How To Claim A Promise/A Life of Self-Discipline
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: What I Got Right and Wrong on My Journey Part 2
programme.desc: In part two of What I Got Right and Wrong on My Journey, Pastor Bayless delves deeper into the decisions that shape our spiritual lives.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Five Times More Favour And Provision
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: 90 Minutes In Heaven
programme.desc: A man involved in a horrific car crash is pronounced dead, only to come back to life an hour and a half later, claiming to have seen Heaven.

programme.title: Autumn Stables
programme.desc: Recently widowed Autumn determined to start fresh, decides to sell her horse ranch to a seemingly trustworthy buyer, Jake.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Five Times More Favour And Provision
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: HRH The Prince of Wales talks to Diane Louise Jordan about the challenges facing young people living in inner city London, and songwriter Lou Fellingham leads the contemporary worship in All Saints Church.

programme.title: HumanKind
programme.desc: The vast expanses of rural Queensland don't deter Debbie Bazzo from spreading kindness. With Care Outreach, she traverses great distances to bring support and companionship to isolated communities.

programme.title: When We Last Spoke

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Fibbler's Fakery Goes Up In Fireworks
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner, his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom and kindness somehow seem to save the day.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Hickam and Lee clash with the mayor of Benson Hills, and Henry suggests a solution with huge implications for the town. Elizabeth and Nathan clear up a misunderstanding.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Day of Discovery
programme.sub-title: The Search for meaning: Science and God
programme.desc: This weekly, documentary-style series offers a view of current and historical events, biblical prophecy, and contemporary issues of importance to those of the Christian faith.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: HRH The Prince of Wales talks to Diane Louise Jordan about the challenges facing young people living in inner city London, and songwriter Lou Fellingham leads the contemporary worship in All Saints Church.

programme.title: When We Last Spoke
programme.desc: Two sisters are raised by grandparents in the town of Fireside. Humour and heartbreak are served with whipped cream in this heartwarming tale of family, friendship and forgiveness.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: Presenting the lives of true-life heroes from Christian history, witness and be inspired by what God can do through a 'Torchlighter' who dedicated themselves to a life of whole-hearted commitment & passionate service to Jesus.

programme.title: Ancestors: New Testament
programme.sub-title: Simon Peter, Mary Magdalene, Sadducees and Pharisees
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from. Hilarious animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Acclaimed speaker & TV presenter Gary Kent has produced numerous documentaries on subjects including the Bible, Bible prophecy, world events, historical places & natural health. His passion is to share the good news of Jesus' soon return.

programme.title: Helping Hands
programme.desc: Helping Hands TV celebrates the people making the world a better place. This inspiring and uplifting program facilitates conversations to empower viewers to make a positive impact in their own circles of influence.

programme.title: Just Jake
programme.desc: An emerging country star returns to his hometown to overcome his serious writers' block, and reunites with his high school sweetheart. Together they rediscover love and music.

programme.title: Vindication
programme.desc: Tre interrogates the victim's family while Travis seeks to avoid a barrage of attacks.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Following Jesus in John's Gospel Pt6
programme.desc: A six week series exploring the somewhat unique perspective of following Jesus found in John's Gospel.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Five Times More Favour And Provision Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: Just Jake
programme.desc: An emerging country star returns to his hometown to overcome his serious writers' block, and reunites with his high school sweetheart. Together they rediscover love and music.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: The POstables are back identifying the intended recipients of a trio of dead letters which have a surprising, personal impact on all of them.

programme.title: Moonrise
programme.desc: A country singer and his family learn how to live life again after his wife passes away.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Accepting Jesus requires faith, and to be born again.A John 3 (Boise 1982).

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, relatable, life-changing and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Five Times More Favour And Provision Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: River Wild
programme.desc: A thrill-seeking trip quickly turns into a desperate fight for survival when white-water rafters become stranded in raging rapids, and someone seems intent on sabotage to ensure secrets stay buried.

programme.title: Freediver
programme.desc: Freediver Alexey Molchanov tries to set five world records in under four months. His ambitious quest takes him to the farthest reaches of the globe and to the very edge of human performance.

programme.title: Blue Beetle
programme.desc: A Mexican-American college grad's life is turned upside down when a mysterious scarab gives him the ability to generate an exoskeleton suit of incredible power.

programme.title: Relax, I'm from the Future
programme.desc: Casper, a time traveller, arrives in the present with a habit of meeting people he knows are about to die and confessing the truth about himself.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Follows Morris, who must coach a misfit softball team of his fellow housemates during his mandatory stay at Sweet Dreams sober living in order to get his life back on track.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as they're pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venom's home world.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: The Bad Boys are back, but this time with a twist: Miami's finest are now on the run.

programme.title: Diddy: The Making of a Bad Boy
programme.desc: Exploring Diddy's journey from Sean Combs to Puffy and Diddy, his childhood, music career, and the recent sexual misconduct allegations that challenge perceptions.

programme.title: King of the Apocalypse
programme.desc: Dakota Adams, son of Oath Keepers' Stewart Rhodes, explores the American militia movement and his father's conviction for seditious conspiracy amidst a turbulent family life.

programme.title: Dumb Money
programme.desc: The ultimate David versus Goliath story about the insane true story of everyday people who flipped the script on Wall Street and got rich by turning GameStop into the world's hottest company.

programme.title: The Bikeriders
programme.desc: Over the course of a decade, a Midwestern motorcycle club evolves from a gathering place for local outsiders to a sinister gang, threatening the original group's way of life.

programme.title: Longlegs
programme.desc: In pursuit of a serial killer, an FBI agent uncovers a series of occult clues that she must solve to end his terrifying killing spree.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter
programme.desc: Kraven's complex relationship with his ruthless father starts him down a path of vengeance, motivating him to become not only the greatest hunter in the world, but also one of its most feared.

programme.title: Christmas Eve in Miller's Point
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a family gathers for what may be their last holiday in their ancestral home. As tensions rise, a teen sneaks out with friends to take over the wintry suburb for herself.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: After failing to fight for his family during a robbery, an unassuming father calls on skills from his hidden past to become a lethal vigilante blazing a wild ride to revenge.

programme.title: The Killer
programme.desc: An assassin tries to make amends in an effort to restore the sight of a beautiful young singer.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When an Army Major is framed for treason, Reacher discovers she's the target of a massive government conspiracy and risks everything to take down the corrupt organisation.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: In a black comedy about small-time hoods and big-time criminals, the lives of seemingly unrelated people are woven together in a wild and exhilarating adventure that thrills and amuses.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: As war rages in Europe, a Nazi-scalping squad of American soldiers, known to their enemy as The Basterds, is on a daring mission to take down the leaders of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: In 1969 Los Angeles, during the Charles Manson murders, a TV actor and his stunt double embark on an odyssey to make a name for themselves in the film industry.

programme.title: Sucker Punch
programme.desc: A young woman incarcerated in a psychiatric institution against her will creates a fantastical world within her imagination to help her and four other inmates escape from a frightening fate.

programme.title: Kill
programme.desc: During a train trip to New Delhi, a pair of commandos face an army of invading bandits.

programme.title: Suicide Squad
programme.desc: A secret government agency recruits some of the most dangerous, imprisoned, supervillains to execute high-risk, black-ops missions in exchange for clemency.

programme.title: Tango & Cash
programme.desc: Two narcotics detectives can't stand each other. When a crime lord frames them for murder, they have to buddy up to clear their names and put him away.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: Based on the hit '90s animation, the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles are back and have teamed up with news reporter April O'Neill to save New York City from the evil Shredder.

programme.title: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Get ready to rumble in the jungle when a tough bounty hunter is sent deep into the Amazon to bring back his boss' son - a job that's not gonna be as easy!

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Sudden death takes on a whole new meaning in this suspenseful action tale where a retired fire-fighter's daughter gets caught up in a terrorist's plan to blow up 17,000 hockey fans.

programme.title: Adventures in Zambezia
programme.desc: When a young falcon named Kai learns of the famed bird city of Zambezia, he journeys there against his father's wishes. But when his dad is captured, Kai must rescue him and new friends.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Nanny McPhee is a wonderfully hideous, mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon: Hidden World
programme.desc: What began as an unlikely friendship between an adolescent Viking and a fearsome Night Fury dragon has become an epic adventure spanning their lives.

programme.title: Storks
programme.desc: Storks have moved on from delivering babies to packages. But when an order for a baby appears, the best delivery stork must scramble to fix the error by delivering the baby.

programme.title: Matilda
programme.desc: A wonderful little girl who happens to be a genius, along with her understanding teacher, outwit the worst parents and the worst school principal imaginable.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Shrek and his posse embark on a new, trouble-filled adventure, in search of their next king. Another fun family romp.

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: Shrek now finds himself in a twisted, alternate version of Far Far Away, where ogres are hunted, Rumpelstiltskin is king, and Shrek and Fiona have never met. He must undo all he's done to save his world.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: When aliens discover video feeds of classic arcade games and misinterpret them as a declaration of war, they attack the Earth, using the video games as models for their assaults.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: When college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers, he must accept his destiny and join Optimus Prime and Bumblebee in their epic battle.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' the Lorax
programme.desc: A young boy searches for the one thing that will enable him to win the affection of the girl of his dreams. He must discover the story of the Lorax, the creature who fights to protect his world.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: After an aptitude test mix-up, Fred Flintstone trades his job as Bronto-crane operator for a vice presidency. An evil executive then plots to use Fred as the fall guy in an embezzlement scheme.

programme.title: Tad The Lost Explorer
programme.desc: Due to a fortuitous mix-up, Tad, a dreamy construction worker, is mistaken for a famous archaeologist and sent on an expedition to Peru.

programme.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
programme.desc: Spirit is a wild and rambunctious stallion who travels across the frontiers of the Old West; where he befriends a young human and finds true love with a mare.

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: Curse Of Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: Wallace and his loyal dog, Gromit, set out to discover the mystery behind the garden sabotage that plagues their village and threatens the annual giant vegetable growing contest.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are BFFs who accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's the hero named Captain Underpants. They must stop a new teacher who is bent on ridding the world of laughter.

programme.title: Richard the Stork and the Mystery of ...
programme.desc: Little sparrow Richard meets a flock of sparrows who are being held captive by the peacock Zamano. To regain their freedom, they have to go on a great adventure together and find a mysterious treasure.

programme.title: Blade
programme.desc: Blade - half-mortal, half-immortal - fights vampires who crave his special blood type for their plan to exterminate the human race.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: The true account of the disastrous US raid to capture a Somali warlord in 1993. When the mission goes wrong, elite forces must fight their way out.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: When Eddie Brock acquires the powers of a Symbiote, he will have to release his alter-ego 'Venom' to save his life.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Dr Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: After a radioactive spider bite, a nerdy teen develops keen senses and amazing strength.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Peter Parker struggles to juggle his life with his Spider-Man persona as a new foe emerges: the deranged scientist, Otto Octavius.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: The web-spinning superhero must battle his own demons and a barrage of new villains including Sandman and Venom.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: After Peter Parker is bitten by a genetically altered spider, he gains new-found, spider-like powers and ventures out to save the city from the machinations of a mysterious reptilian foe.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Spider-Man's greatest battle begins when an evil corporation attempts world domination by deploying an army of super villains to crush Peter Parker.

programme.title: Men in Black
programme.desc: Agents who monitor aliens must foil an intergalactic plot to prevent two worlds from colliding. It's just another typical day for the Men in Black crack team.

programme.title: Old
programme.desc: A family on a tropical holiday discover that the secluded beach where they are relaxing is somehow causing them to age rapidly, reducing their entire lives to a single day.

programme.title: Punisher: War Zone
programme.desc: The most determined of all vigilantes in Marvel Comics wages a no-holds-barred, one-man war against a horribly disfigured crime lord called Jigsaw.

programme.title: Escape Room
programme.desc: A psychological thriller about six strangers who find themselves in circumstances beyond their control and must use their wits to find clues or die.

programme.title: Horrible Bosses
programme.desc: Tormented by their self-centred and cruel employers, three friends see no way of escaping but to kill their bosses, but carrying out their plans proves to be trickier than they thought.

programme.title: Hot Rod
programme.desc: This hilarious comedy is about an amateur stuntman who has to stage the stunt of his life to pay for his mean stepdad's operation. The stunt: to jump 15 buses!

programme.title: Zoolander
programme.desc: The misadventures of clueless model Derek Zoolander, who is hired to stop a cartel of political killers posing as male models.

programme.title: Scary Movie
programme.desc: In this send-up of the most popular horror movies, a familiar-looking group of teenagers find themselves being stalked by a more-than-vaguely recognisable masked killer.

programme.title: Father Figures
programme.desc: After discovering their father didn't die when they were young, two brothers set off to find him. They end up learning more about their mother than they ever wanted to know.

programme.title: Half-Baked: Totally High
programme.desc: Three potheads sell a strain of magical weed to raise funds for their friend's funeral.

programme.title: Couples Retreat
programme.desc: Four bickering couples embark on a journey to a tropical island resort. While one of the couples is there to work on their marriage, the other three set out to enjoy some fun in the sun.

programme.title: Horrible Bosses 2
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite working stiffs get back to business and wreak havoc in the workplace.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: When a single mother and her two kids arrive in a small town, they begin to discover their connection to the original Ghostbusters and the secret legacy their grandfather left behind.

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: In this romantic comedy, Sonny Koufax is a carefree slob trying to save his love life by becoming responsible. He gets the chance when a cute kid turns up needing a father.

programme.desc: Following years of growing apart, Harold and Kumar embark on another ill-advised journey through NYC, where their search takes them through party heaven, and almost blows Christmas Eve sky-high.

programme.title: Horrible Bosses 2
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite working stiffs get back to business and wreak havoc in the workplace.

programme.title: Sweethearts
programme.desc: Two college freshmen make a pact to break up with their high school sweethearts over Thanksgiving break.

programme.title: This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Minnie and Quinn are born one minute apart, leading very different lives. Years later, they reconnect and wonder if it's time to take a chance on love.

programme.title: Single White Female
programme.desc: A woman's ad for a female tenant opens the door to unrelenting terror. She takes over her spare room, her boyfriend and her identity.

programme.title: Notting Hill

programme.desc: A single mother searches for a suitable man to become the father of her precocious baby.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: A morbidly obese professor becomes a Casanova when he takes a miracle weight-loss potion.

programme.title: Buried in Barstow
programme.desc: Hazel King is a single mother determined to protect her daughter from the life she once had while defending and protecting those who can't protect themselves.

programme.title: Kidnapping in the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: Two best friends hiking the Grand Canyon trust a hiking guide to take them on an off trail adventure.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Pearl In The Mist
programme.desc: Fate whisked Ruby from a simple life in the Louisiana bayou. But her new riches bring more treachery than happiness.

programme.title: Dying For A Crown
programme.desc: A new student at a high school stops at nothing to gain popularity and become homecoming queen at the prom.

programme.title: Envy: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Gabrielle Flores has it all: a devoted husband, a beautiful daughter, and one of the best PR firms in the country.

programme.title: Lust: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Tiffanie is about to have the wedding of her dreams to her soul mate Damon. But when Damon's old friend Trey arrives, fresh from prison, to be Damon's best man, Tiffanie's whole world is rocked.

programme.title: Greed: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: When interior decorator Zuri Maxwell meets a handsome benefactor and entrepreneur, she compromises the values and morals that should guide her, in an effort to be part of his world.

programme.title: Wrath: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Single lawyer Chastity Jeffries believes she's found her perfect match in Xavier Collins, but his obsessive love forces her to confront how far she's strayed from her own principles.

programme.title: My Amish Double Life
programme.desc: Emma is a young Amish woman who leads a double life by sneaking out to clubs to flirt and have fun. However, when she accidentally witnesses a murder, her life and community get thrown into peril.

programme.title: I Was Octomom
programme.desc: In 2009 Natalie Suleman gives birth to eight children with the help of IVF, only to have her life torn apart and her identity rebranded by the media.

programme.title: Harry and Meghan: Escaping the Palace
programme.desc: The couple decide to step back from the duties of the British monarchy following the birth of their son Archie.

programme.title: Stalked by a Prince
programme.desc: Publicist Alyssa thinks she's in a fairytale when she meets a British prince who whisks her away to Europe. Alyssa's dream turns into a nightmare when the prince refuses to let her leave.

programme.title: And Baby Will Fall
programme.desc: Expectant parents become prime suspects in the disappearance of a pregnant woman who was last seen at their garage sale.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: Having been jilted at the altar, a literary aide to a controversial author thinks nothing of a fleeting liaison with a man she meets on a business flight.

programme.title: A Sister's Nightmare
programme.desc: Police officer Jane Rydert's life goes into a tailspin the day her older sister Cassidy shows up at her door after 16 years of confinement in a psychiatric hospital.

programme.title: My Father's Murder in Greece
programme.desc: When Allie's father George takes her on a celebratory trip to Greece to discover her familial roots, George is murdered. Allie must uncover family secrets to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Girl in Room 13
programme.desc: Grace becomes addicted to opioids after suffering a sports injury. She's ready to leave her addiction behind under her mother's watch, but Richie kidnaps her to sell her into human trafficking.

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: This story follows Maurice, a streetwise cat, who has the perfect money-making scam. He finds a dumb-looking kid who plays a pipe and has his very own horde of rats.

programme.title: Their Finest
programme.desc: Catrin, an untried screenwriter, and a makeshift cast and crew work under fire to make a film to lift the nation's spirits, and inspire America to join the war.

programme.title: Breathe
programme.desc: The inspiring true love story of Robin and Diana Cavendish, an adventurous couple who refuse to give up in the face of a devastating disease.

programme.title: Tell it to the Bees
programme.desc: A shunned small-town doctor and beekeeper in post-war Britain befriends a struggling mother and son, helping them discover that love can be found in many forms.

programme.title: Viceroy's House
programme.desc: The final Viceroy of India, Lord Mountbatten, is tasked with overseeing the transition of British India to independence, but meets with conflict as different sides clash.

programme.title: The Professor and the Madman
programme.desc: James Murray begins compiling words for the first edition of the Oxford English Dictionary in the mid 19th century, receiving over 10,000 entries from an asylum patient.

programme.title: My Generation
programme.desc: Painstakingly assembled over the last six years, British film icon Michael Caine tells the vivid and inspiring story of his personal journey through 1960s London.

programme.title: Harry Brown
programme.desc: An elderly ex-marine avenges his friend's vicious murder by meting out his own brand of justice.

programme.title: Tommy's Honour
programme.desc: Tom and Tommy Morris, father and son pioneers of professional golf, rely on skill, business acumen, and working-class street smarts to make Tommy one of the world's first sports superstars.

programme.title: 44 Inch Chest
programme.desc: A man is shattered by his wife's infidelity. When his friends urge him to exact retribution, he wrestles with remorse, grief and self pity.

programme.title: A Little Chaos
programme.desc: This period drama tells the tale of two landscape artists who become romantically involved while constructing the grand gardens at King Louis XIV's palace at Versailles.

programme.title: Route Irish
programme.desc: A security contractor in Iraq rejects the official explanation of his friend's death and decides to investigate.

programme.title: Another Year
programme.desc: This drama chronicles four seasons in the lives of a happy couple and their relationships with family and friends.

programme.title: Alone in Berlin
programme.desc: In the heart of terror in 1940, two German people resist everyday life and have an extraordinary impact.

programme.title: Windrider
programme.desc: A female rock singer romances a champion surfer, but just as it seems life couldn't get better setbacks threaten a wipeout. Nicole Kidman stars in her first adult role, with Tom Burlinson.

programme.title: Mr. Reliable
programme.desc: In this bizarre, true story police think Wally has his wife and child as hostages, and he relishes the media circus.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: Sonny and his kangaroo Skippy live in Waratah National Park in New South Wales. Matt Hammond, Sonny's father is the park ranger. Skippy saves the day in many adventures.

programme.title: Ship to Shore
programme.desc: Julie starts 'Fauna Watch' to protect Circe Island's ecosystem, but her friendship with Ralph strains when he tries to turn her club into a Sea Scout troop.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Katerina returns determined to win Rivers' heart from Sam.

programme.title: Sons of Steel
programme.desc: When Aussie heavy metal singer and peace activist Black Alice finds himself in a dystopian future, he must go back in time to save the world from a nuclear disaster.

programme.title: Not Quite Hollywood

programme.desc: The final 18 holes of the 124th US Open play out from Pinehurst Resort as Bryson DeChambeau chasing a second major title, and Rory McIlroy chasing his fifth, deliver one of the most thrilling duels in golf.

programme.title: US Open: Final Round 2008 Tiger
programme.desc: From The Torry Pines Golf Club in San Diego, California.

programme.title: US Open: Final Round 2011 Mcllroy
programme.desc: The Rory runaway at Congressional was in evidence at the halfway mark, when McIlroy shot 65-66 to take a 6-stroke lead at the halfway point. He followed it up with 2 more rounds in the 60s to post a 72-hole record total of 268.

programme.title: US Open: Final Round 2006 Ogilvy
programme.desc: Taking advantage of the 72nd hole struggles of Phil Mickelson, Jim Furyk and Colin Montgomerie, Australian Geoff Ogilvy managed a pair of pars over his last two holes, to post a one-stroke victory.
